flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kirtland Community College fell 29% between 2006 and 2009 (23.6% → 16.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kirtland Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $9.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kirtland Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kirtland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
